title: Amtech T0400C 50mm Iron Padlock
features: DURABLE: This 50mm iron padlock has a heavy duty solid iron body with an 8mm hardened steel shackle
VERSATILE: Supplied with 3 keys, it can be used for a wide range of security applications
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Am-Tech 50mm iron padlock. Tough iron padlock suitable for a variety of security applications. Heavy duty solid iron body with hardened steel shackle. Supplied with 3 keys. Blister packed.Am Tech provides a 12 Month guarantee on all their products. Am Tech only use the best materials in their products to provide a product that meets your expectations Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Padlock See more
